message:
Add exception handling, fix dict bugs, implement class inheritance

Agent 1 - Exception handling:
- Added try/except/finally parsing (lexer, AST, parser)
- Finally blocks generate as Zig defer statements
- Try blocks generate as scope blocks
- Except handlers parse but don't catch yet (limitation)
- Keywords: Try, Except, Finally

Agent 2 - Dictionary fixes:
- Fixed len(dict) to use .count() not .len
- Fixed dict[key] to use .get(key).? not [key]
- dict_simple.py now passes
- Note: dict methods (keys, values) not implemented yet

Agent 3 - Class inheritance:
- Implemented class Dog(Animal) syntax
- Method copying: Child inherits non-overridden parent methods
- Added class registry in NativeCodegen
- Override detection prevents duplicates

Known limitations:
- Exception catching not functional (needs error union support)
- Dict methods (keys, values, items) not implemented
- Class inheritance doesn't support super() or multiple inheritance

Test results: 42/89 passing (47% - no change, features parse but tests may fail on other issues)
